ATOMFAIR® SP-V1000 Visible Spectrophotometer

Product Type: Spectrophotometer
Atomfair Model: AF-SP-V1000
Research-grade laboratory platform

Product Overview

SP-V1000 is a source-manual spectrophotometer model with complete optical, wavelength, photometric, power, dimension and weight parameters preserved.

Atomfair documentation keeps the source product naming while replacing supplier branding and assigning a unified Atomfair ordering model.

Key Features and Advantages

  • Single-beam optical platform for routine absorbance and transmittance work.
  • Complete wavelength, photometric accuracy, repeatability, stability and stray-light data are preserved.
  • USB and printer output support data export and laboratory documentation.
